QuitGPT.org

Added on 5th April 2026

It's not too late to undermine the ChatGPT supremacy 🤔 Also, good for QuitGPT.org for not simply boycotting, but also suggesting alternatives!:

Some higher privacy and open-source alternatives include: Lumo, Confer, Mistral, and LLaMA. Alternate corporate options include Gemini from Google and Claude from Anthropic.
